project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo (turbo-powered) with packages/, apps/, services/
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + turbo. Node 22 required (source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22). Each package has its own tsconfig.json with composite: true.
test_framework: vitest with globals: true, environment: node. Tests in src/__tests__/ directories. Coverage via @vitest/coverage-v8.
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm install. 2. Run pnpm typecheck on affected packages. 3. Run pnpm test on affected packages. 4. Verify all exports in index.ts files are valid.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node 22 via nvm. pnpm 10.28.1. TypeScript ~5.5.0.
contribution_requirements: Packages use .js extensions in imports (bundler resolution). Types exported separately. Each package has package.json with main/types pointing to src/index.ts. Tests use vitest globals (describe/it/expect without imports).
key_patterns: Provider pattern: interface + class implementations with makeResult helpers. Router pattern for provider selection with priority/cost sorting. Types in separate types.ts file. Index.ts re-exports all public API. Tests follow describe/it pattern with mock providers.
directory_structure: packages/generative-media/src/ has: types.ts, index.ts, providers/ (image, video, music), router/, cost/, safety/, provenance/, __tests__/. New packages will follow same structure: src/ with types.ts, index.ts, feature dirs, __tests__/.
